# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# south Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions. Main Path A
#   wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
> south
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# take feed Taken.
> take feed
# drop feed Dropped. The pygmy goats spot the bag of feed and rush over! They
#   crowd around, bleating excitedly, and devour the corn and pellets in
#   seconds.
> drop feed
# west Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> west
# west Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> west
# west Gift Shop A small zoo gift shop crammed with stuffed animals and
#   postcards. A large souvenir penny press machine stands near the door.
> west
# examine press A heavy cast-iron machine with a big crank handle. A slot on
#   top accepts pennies, and the mechanism stamps them with a zoo animal
#   design.
> examine press
# east Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> east
# east Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> east
# take penny Taken. *DING DONG* "It's FEEDING TIME at the Petting Zoo! Come
#   watch our pygmy goats and rabbits enjoy their favorite snacks!"
> take penny
# west Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> west
# west Gift Shop A small zoo gift shop crammed with stuffed animals and
#   postcards. A large souvenir penny press machine stands near the door.
> west
# Store the penny in the press
# put penny in press You put souvenir penny in souvenir press.
> put penny in press
# inventory You are carrying: pressed penny *DING DONG* "Attention visitors!
#   One hour until closing. Please begin making your way toward the exit."
> inventory
